narrative: Trump pauses Project Freedom as Iran peace hopes lift precious metals — gold surges +2.05% toward $4,662 while USD/JPY retreats to 156.31 on intervention caution and a narrowing -60bp Fed-BoJ carry bid. NAB's hawkish shift to a June RBA hike supports AUD/USD at 0.7247, defying the -+300bp Fed-RBA carry disadvantage; equities +0.81%; DXY -0.39%; VIX 17.4. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27 for NZD directional cues.
